steps.name: chmod_wrappers
steps.command: chmod +x scripts/jcodemunch-mcp.sh && chmod +x scripts/mcp-postgres.sh && chmod +x scripts/mcp-filesystem.sh && chmod +x scripts/mcp-github.sh && chmod +x scripts/mcp-context7.sh
